dataset: CIEL (Columbia International eHealth Laboratory) Concept Dictionary
case_id: Malaria concept mapping to SNOMED CT code 61462000

pi_items.source: CIEL concept dictionary (pre-loaded in Bahmni/OpenMRS); confirmed via CIEL documentation and implementation references on OpenMRS Talk and GitHub (Bahmni/openmrs-module-snomed)

pi_items.verified_value: SNOMED CT (Systematized Nomenclature of Medicine – Clinical Terms)
pi_items.source: Official SNOMED International terminology standard (https://www.snomed.org/); verified via NLM (https://www.nlm.nih.gov/healthit/snomedct/index.html); confirmed as standard OpenMRS/Bahmni mapping source in setup_task.sh line 29 and multiple OpenMRS documentation pages

Official SNOMED CT code for 'Malaria (disorder)'; independently verified via multiple authoritative sources: (1) findacode.com (https://www.findacode.com/snomed/61462000--malaria.html), (2) SNOMED Browser (https://snomedbrowser.com/Codes/Details/61462000), (3) CDC PHINVADS (https://phinvads.cdc.gov/vads/ViewCodeSystemConcept.action?oid=2.16.840.1.113883.6.96&code=61462000), (4) NCBI BioPortal

Standard OpenMRS concept mapping relationship type; verified via OpenMRS official documentation (https://openmrs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/docs/pages/25470946/Concept+Mapping+Changes and https://wiki.openmrs.org/display/docs/Concept+Terms+and+Mappings), which states 'Concepts that are exactly the same in the entirety of their meaning are mapped with a SAME-AS relationship'; also confirmed by setup_task.sh line 47 which creates the SAME-AS map type

privileged_info_summary: The task maps the 'Malaria' concept from the CIEL concept dictionary to SNOMED CT code 61462000 using the SAME-AS relationship type. All claims are verified against authoritative sources: (1) Malaria is a real diagnosis concept in CIEL, the Columbia International eHealth Laboratory concept dictionary with over 56,000 concepts used in OpenMRS/Bahmni systems. (2) SNOMED CT is the official Systematized Nomenclature of Medicine – Clinical Terms standard maintained by SNOMED International, containing over 357,000 health care concepts, and is a required standard for U.S. Federal Government healthcare systems. (3) Code 61462000 is the verified official SNOMED CT code for 'Malaria (disorder)', confirmed by findacode.com, SNOMED Browser, CDC PHINVADS, and NCBI BioPortal. (4) SAME-AS is a standard OpenMRS concept mapping type used only when concepts are identical in meaning, confirmed in official OpenMRS documentation.
